scripts.dev: PYTHONPATH=. TMPDIR=/tmp UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.lint: TMPDIR=/tmp UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run ruff check .
scripts.typecheck: TMPDIR=/tmp UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run mypy app tests
scripts.test: PYTHONPATH=. TMPDIR=/tmp UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run pytest
